titleStmt.title: SII 18.48: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 48. (B.K. No. 8 of 1934-35.) BENAKANAKOṆḌA, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the southern entrance to the Kalamēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 955, Śrīmukha, Mārgaśira Amāvāsyā, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti, Solar eclipse. The date is irregular. In the cyclic year Śrīmukha, Mārgaśira Amāvasyā fell on November 24, A.D. 1033, which was a Saturday. There was also no solar eclipse on that day. The only solar eclipse which occurred in that year was on Āshāḍha Amāvāsyā, i.e., June 29, Friday.

It registers a grant of certain privileges to Vaijayya and his brother Sōvimayya, the ūroḍeya, of the agrahāra town Beḷgali. The gift was made by Mahāsāmantādhipati Chikk-Āycharasa, when he was governing Sattaḷige Seventy. He is described as the son (maga) of Jayasiṅgadēva. It is also stated that Uttavayya of the Chikkaṁba family was the nāḷgāvuṇḍa and that the gift was made in the presence of Ēchimayyanāyaka and nāḍa-karaṇa Mārasiṅgha. It also registers a supplementary grant of land to god Mahādēva (by Uttavayya).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷaka cāḻukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalla
dēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttire svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabda
mahāsāmaṁta kaṭa(ṁ)kamunniṟivaṁ ghaṭeya beṁkoḷvaṁ śrīma
jjayasiṁgadēvara magaṁ cikkāycayyarasar sattaḷige
yeḻpattumanēkāyattamāḻuttamire cikkaṁbavaṁsōdbhavaṁ
manneya siṁpu guṇagaṇōttuṁga daḷakoppuvāta lōkavi
khyāta sakaḷakaḷādharaṁ vairilakṣmīdharaṁ puṇamēsvaradēva
pādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ śrīmaduttevayyaṁ nāḷgāvuṇḍu
geyye svasti pusiyilladātanaṇnana baṁṭa śauca
gāṁgēyaṁ satyayudhiṣṭhiraṁ sōmēśvaradāsi dharmada
mēru śrīmadēcimayyanāyakaranubhavaṇeyā
ge nāḍakaraṇa mārasiṁghayyaṁ modalāge sakavarṣa 955
neya śrīmukha saṁvatsarada mārggasiradamavāsye sō
mavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti sūryyagrahaṇa
mintappa puṇyatithiyoḻu mahāsāmanta ci
kkāycayyarasar Agrahāra beḷgaliya Ū
roḍeyaṁ sōvimayyanātana tammaṁ vaijayyaṁ
gaḷge Uppu tuppaṁ biṭṭi bīyaṁ Intivaṟa padi
pu hāraṇe modalāge paña rasavarjjitaṁ dhārā
pūrvvakaṁ Eṟedu biṭṭa datti Īntapudaṁ pratipā
ḷisade kiḍisidavar kurukṣētradoḷaṁ bāṇarāsi
yoḷaṁ sāsirakavileyanaḷida pañcamahāpā
takar Īṁntida nirantara pratipāḷisidavar kuru
kṣētradoḷaṁ bāṇarāsiyoḷaṁ sāsirakavileyaṁ dā
naṁ geyda phaḷamaneyduvar . harakaṭṭada keṟeya ke
ḷage mahādēvarggaṁ biṭṭa gadde kamma 50 śrīmatmanneyaṁ
Uttavayyarasara biṭṭa datti piṇḍādānaṁ gadyāṇavā
ṟuvaṁ tiṟuvar Īntidaṁ pratipāḷisade Aḷidavaṁ pañca
mahāpātakanakku . ślōka . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasē
tuṁ nripāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvā
nētāṁnu bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrō bhūyō bhūyō yā
catē rāmabhadraḥ . svada(ṁ)ttaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
dha vasuṁdharā saṣṭhirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi © ©
Digital edition of SII 18.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
